title: Plug-and-Play Swarm & Memory Tool Intake
status: static planning only — no install, no clone, no execution, no live agent launch

dependencies.n6_29b: merged — computer_use_adapter files untouched by N+6.30A

tools.name: Subagents (built-in Claude Code)
tools.notes: Already in active use. Spawn with explicit read-only prompts for safety.

tools.name: am-will/swarms
tools.notes: Skills-based orchestration (no separate server). parallel-task can launch up to 15 subagents. License unverified — patterns only until confirmed.

tools.name: ECC / Everything Claude Code
tools.notes: Bundle of commands/agents/skills/hooks. MIT. Install only in isolated throwaway profile. Wire executable hooks is the risk — governance/scanner patterns safe to adapt.

tools.name: affaan-m/claude-swarm
tools.notes: Terminal-UI multi-agent orchestration. Patterns adapted: dependency graph, file conflict detection, budget gate, auditor role, arena visualization. Trial: separate throwaway profile only.

tools.name: ClawTeam (HKUDS/ClawTeam)
tools.notes: One-command goal → orchestrated agent team. Local JSON state, no server. 'Full automation' is the risk — needs dry-run-first gate before any Ghoti use.

tools.name: Ruflo / Claude Flow
tools.can_write_without_approval: yes — install hooks run on npm install
tools.notes: Supply-chain history: malicious npm pre-install (v3.1.0-alpha.55..v3.5.2), MCP prompt-injection #1375, SQL injection. Patterns only; never install. Defer indefinitely.

tools.name: TryCUA / CUA Driver
tools.notes: Live desktop control via Docker/QEMU/KASM. 189 shell scripts. Patterns powering N+6.29A adapter. Real use needs Docker milestone + confined sandbox gate.

tools.name: UI-TARS
tools.notes: Ambiguous source (model vs desktop app vs SDK). Operator must confirm exact repo URL. Patterns used in N+5.0A observation adapter and N+6.29A. No clone until source confirmed.

tools.name: Claude Mem
tools.notes: Operator must confirm exact repo/tool. Likely a memory layer for Claude session continuity. If file-based and local, compatible with Ghoti Memory Vault pattern.

tools.name: Obsidian-skills
tools.notes: Operator must confirm exact source. Would bridge Obsidian vault as shared human/agent memory. No destructive vault edits until operator confirms the approach.

tools.name: MemPalace / memory-palace (agent memory)
tools.inspected_milestone: N+6.24A (PAO app is a separate future product)
tools.notes: Distinct from the PAO memory palace learning app (N+6.24A, Tier-1-last). This is a structured memory store for agent context. Operator confirms exact repo.
tools.disambiguation: MemPalace/memory-palace agent memory != PAO app product (N+6.24A)

tools.name: Dynamic Workflows (/workflows)
tools.notes: Research preview. Generates and runs a JS orchestration script. Read the generated JS before any execution. Ghoti: off until a dedicated audited milestone.

tools.name: Agent Teams (CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS)
tools.auto_vs_manual: experimental env var; then semi-auto 2–16 agents
tools.notes: Experimental. 2-16 parallel live agents. Highest token cost. Off until dedicated milestone with worktree-per-agent isolation and kill switch.

tools.name: Background Agents (/bg)
tools.notes: Async background sessions. Useful but adds unmonitored agent surface. Off in Ghoti until kill-switch milestone.

tools.name: OpenDream / opendreams (memory consolidation)
tools.purpose: Consolidates past sessions into a persistent memory layer; dreams through prior interactions to synthesize a structured memory summary.
tools.notes: Operator must confirm exact repo. No URL guessed. Read-only first; any memory write must be previewed and human-approved. Must not auto-write AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md. No sensitive data stored.

tools.name: dream-skill (Claude Code skill-style memory consolidation)
tools.purpose: Claude Code SKILL.md-style memory consolidation: read-only walk of session history, synthesis pass, approval gate before writing summary.
tools.notes: Operator must confirm exact skill source. Pattern (read-only walk + synthesis + approval gate) can be implemented natively in Ghoti without third-party code if source not found. Never auto-writes AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md.

tools.name: dream-memory (persistent reflective memory layer)
tools.purpose: Persistent reflective memory layer with a consolidation loop: reads prior context, identifies key facts and decisions, writes a structured consolidated memory file.
tools.notes: Operator must confirm exact repo. No URL guessed. Must remain local and file-based. Any write requires human preview and approval. No sensitive data, secrets, private paths, or health details stored.

tools.name: memory-lancedb-dreaming (vector memory with dream phases)
tools.purpose: Memory promotion via LanceDB vector store with dream phases: consolidates short-term context into long-term structured memory during consolidation loops.
tools.notes: Operator must confirm exact repo. LanceDB adds a vector-DB dependency — evaluate whether local/file-only mode is available. Do not connect to cloud LanceDB. source_needed; no clone until confirmed.

deepseek_provider_routing.action: no API key yet; plan only

rust_runtime.action: N+6.28B Rust policy checker on main; bridge wiring next

dreams_memory_consolidation.action: operator confirms exact repo for each candidate (open_dream, dream_skill, dream_memory, memory_lancedb_dreaming)
